description_long: This object is a tall, slender sunflower with a single, prominent yellow bloom at the top of a green stem. The flower head features a dark brown central disc surrounded by two layers of pointed yellow petals arranged in a radial pattern. The stem is slightly curved and supports three green leaves of varying sizes, each with a smooth, ovate to lanceolate shape. The leaves are attached alternately along the stem, with one leaf positioned lower and two higher up. The overall appearance is naturalistic, with the flower head facing outward and the leaves providing a balanced, organic silhouette. The coloration is dominated by vibrant yellow and green, with subtle shading to suggest depth and texture.
description: A tall sunflower with a yellow, radial bloom and three green, ovate leaves on a slender green stem. The flower head is prominent and detailed, with a dark brown center.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved green stem, the profile of the yellow flower head, and the arrangement of the leaves along the stem.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical yellow petals, dark brown center, and the full display of the three green leaves.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the flower head in profile, showing the curvature of the stem and the alternate leaf arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the yellow petals, the green stem, and the leaves, with the flower head facing away.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled pattern around the central disc, with two visible layers of overlapping, pointed petals creating a symmetrical, daisy-like appearance.
